subject: LIGO/Virgo/KAGRA S230810af: Retraction of GW compact binary merger candidate
body:
The LIGO Scientific Collaboration, the Virgo Collaboration, and the KAGRA Collaboration report:

The trigger S230810af is no longer considered to be a candidate of interest. This candidate included at least one detection prior to the merge time but no significant detection that included the merger, which indicates this candidate is likely a noise transient.
